name: Transtema Group AB
summary: Transtema Group AB provides services and solutions to customers in the areas of networking and communications in Sweden. It offers design, construction, documentation, maintenance, and other consulting services for communications networks. The company also plans, projects, and builds optical fiber networks; and designs and builds computer networks in real estate for fiber and copper-based networks. In addition, it is involved in the planning, construction, commissioning, service, and maintenance of radio networks; and design and expanding of network electronics and active communication equipment, as well as operates as a supplier of network equipment. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in M√É¬∂lndal, Sweden.
